name: adplatform-render-backend
description: Render Express backend for AdPlatform rewards, withdrawals, TimeWall postbacks, VAST proxy, and admin security.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check src/server.js && node --check firebase-admin.js && node --check routes/timewall.js && node --check routes/rewards.js && node --check routes/withdrawals.js && node --check routes/vast.js && node --check routes/admin.js && node --check services/timewall-service.js && node --check services/reward-service.js && node --check services/withdrawal-service.js && node --check services/vast-service.js && node --check services/admin-service.js
